violations.description: DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided. (Chlorine = 50 to 100 ppm)

TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Adequate ventilation noted not present in mens restroom; fan not working. ( Ceiling fan in womens restroom needs cleaning ) Place a covered waste receptacle near toilet in womens restroom.
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mops noted in sink need to be hung-up to air dry.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor in lower level and inside walkin cooler noted not in good repair needs reseal. Holes in walls and ceiling in prep area need repair.
